channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'AI Obsession' Is a Big Nothing Burger
item.description: Concerns about partners obsessed with AI will soon seem outdated.

item.title: The Scott Pelley Meltdown Is Revealing
item.description: News is a business, not a public university with tenure.

item.title: What the Columbia Riot Decision Gets Wrong About Civil Rights
item.description: A federal judge deviates from established law on protected class inclusion.

item.title: Rolling Back Safetyism Requires Parents — and Policymakers
item.description: How can young people become responsible adults if constantly sheltered?
